mapper.insert: INSERT INTO R_LOGIN_HISTORY_T (USER_ID, LOGIN_TYPE, IP_ADDRESS, USER_AGENT) VALUES (#{USER_ID}, #{LOGIN_TYPE}, #{IP_ADDRESS}, #{USER_AGENT})
mapper.update: UPDATE R_LOGIN_HISTORY_T h SET h.LOGOUT_AT = COALESCE( (SELECT MAX(a.CREATED_AT) FROM R_ACTIVITY_LOG_T a WHERE a.HISTORY_ID = h.HISTORY_ID), DATE_ADD(h.LOGIN_AT, INTERVAL #{timeoutMinutes} MINUTE) ) WHERE h.LOGOUT_AT IS NULL AND COALESCE( (SELECT MAX(a.CREATED_AT) FROM R_ACTIVITY_LOG_T a WHERE a.HISTORY_ID = h.HISTORY_ID), h.LOGIN_AT ) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{timeoutMinutes} MINUTE)
UPDATE R_LOGIN_HISTORY_T SET LOGOUT_AT = NOW() WHERE HISTORY_ID = #{historyId} AND LOGOUT_AT IS NULL
